reasoning: The lawsuit between Pxie (Jane Doe) and Destiny (Steven Bonnell) is an intensely litigated, high-profile case involving revenge porn allegations. Destiny has publicly declared that he will not settle the lawsuit, citing an exorbitant $15 million demand and his desire to clear his name or secure a dismissal. As of October 2025, the case (1:25-cv-20757-JB, Southern District of Florida) is mired in hostile procedural fighting, with recent filings regarding motions to seal, disputes over evidence, and new disclosures about witness ages (Doc 139 filed in early October). Given the deep animosity between the parties, the current stage of the litigation, and the explicit resolution criteria that a trial verdict does not count as a settlement, the likelihood of a formal settlement being reached within the remaining ~2 months of 2025 is exceedingly low.
